Many blackberries along the section of trail under the powerlines. Great taste, but I may be wary of the use of herbicides or chemicals used in this area. Access: Public.

Medium shrub on the side of the gravel walking path just east of three dawn redwoods. Not positive on specific elder variety. I visited in early August and the fruit was already passed. Access: Public.
1334 Turk Hill Rd, Fairport, NY 14450, USA

Lots of red raspberries underneath the powerlines here. They are delicious. But I would be wary of herbicide or chemical spray applications. Access: Public.
Crescent Trail Orange, Fairport, NY 14450, USA
Uphill on a trail here. Delicious tangy flavor. The fruit are spikey so I crush them with my incisors to squeeze the pulp out. Access: Public.
